utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Each section is fully specified with comprehensive details: (1) property includes the selected bungalow, type, price, features, and status; (2) financing includes the method, breakdown of assets, home value, timeline, and notes; (3) legal_services includes provider, cost, status, and included tasks; (4) moving_services includes provider, costs breakdown, total, and included services; (5) setup_services includes utilities, setup cost breakdown, and total; (6) total_budget includes cost breakdown and total with funding source. All are fully detailed and complete according to the format.

Thus, the final mapping is: property → 10, financing → 10, legal services → 9, moving services → 7, and utility setup → 9.
